name: Solid Bathroom Wastebasket Can White - Threshold™
description: Get rid of your bathroom waste in discreet style by adding this Solid Bathroom Wastebasket Can from Threshold™ to your bathroom or vanity space. Constructed from solid metal with a simple design, this solid bathroom wastebasket will last through the years, and its simple design makes it easy to incorporate with any decor styles. Complete with a matted exterior and smooth, shiny rim, this circular wastebasket can is sure to make a functional and sleek addition to any space. Coordinate with matching bathroom accessories for a coordinated look.
